qualifications.name: BA Law
notes: Career paths: Legal Advisor, Career in Public Administration.

Notes: Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission due to space constraints; After completing a 3-year BA Law or BCom Law, students can register for an LLB and may complete it within a further 2 years; Additional Language requirement is waived for international students with a non-South African secondary school-leaver certificate that does not include a second language.

subject_requirements.subject: English Home Language or English First Additional Language
